lyrics.text: 好像那时我们都在
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng nà shí wǒ men dōu zài
lyrics.trans: It feels like we were both there back then

lyrics.text: 当时的事都记了起来
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de shì dōu jì le qǐ lái
lyrics.trans: Remembering everything that happened back then

lyrics.text: 时间真的像是长了脚的妖怪
lyrics.pinyin: Shí jiān zhēn de xiàng shì zhǎng le jiǎo de yāo guài
lyrics.trans: Time really is like a monster with legs

lyrics.text: 跑得飞快
lyrics.pinyin: Pǎo de fēi kuài
lyrics.trans: Running away so fast

lyrics.text: 你哼着歌 身影在路灯下被拉长
lyrics.pinyin: Nǐ hēng zhe gē shēn yǐng zài lù dēng xià bèi lā cháng
lyrics.trans: You were humming a song, your silhouette stretched long beneath the streetlights

lyrics.text: 我们牵着手 听彼此说对未来的遐想
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ men qiān zhe shǒu tīng bǐ cǐ shuō duì wèi lái de xiá xiǎng
lyrics.trans: We held hands, listening to each other's daydreams about the future

lyrics.text: 那时的天很凉 你哈气暖我冻红的手掌
lyrics.pinyin: Nà shí de tiān hěn liáng nǐ hā qì nuǎn wǒ dòng hóng de shǒu zhǎng
lyrics.trans: The weather was so cold back then, you blew on my freezing red palms to warm them up

lyrics.text: 时不时看向远方 描绘以后家的模样
lyrics.pinyin: Shí bù shí kàn xiàng yuǎn fāng miáo huì yǐ hòu jiā de mú yàng
lyrics.trans: Looking into the distance from time to time, picturing what our future home would look like

lyrics.text: 后来我们很感性 每次见面都会珍惜
lyrics.pinyin: Hòu lái wǒ men hěn gǎn xìng měi cì jiàn miàn dōu huì zhēn xī
lyrics.trans: Later we grew so sentimental, cherishing every moment we met

lyrics.text: 拥抱后的戒断反应 却远要比想念更窒息
lyrics.pinyin: Yōng bào hòu de jiè duàn fǎn yìng què yuǎn yào bǐ xiǎng niàn gèng zhì xī
lyrics.trans: The withdrawal after our embraces was far more suffocating than just missing you

lyrics.text: 语音循环播放 彼此互放心里
lyrics.pinyin: Yǔ yīn xún huán bō fàng bǐ cǐ hù fàng xīn lǐ
lyrics.trans: Playing our voice messages on loop, holding each other close in our hearts

lyrics.text: 离开始终觉得空荡 因为你是带不走的行李
lyrics.pinyin: Lí kāi shǐ zhōng jué de kōng dàng yīn wèi nǐ shì dài bù zǒu de xíng lǐ
lyrics.trans: Leaving always leaves an empty feeling, because you are the baggage I just can't take along

lyrics.text: 好像那时我们都在
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng nà shí wǒ men dōu zài
lyrics.trans: It feels like we were both there back then

lyrics.text: 当时的事都记了起来
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de shì dōu jì le qǐ lái
lyrics.trans: Remembering everything that happened back then

lyrics.text: 时间真的像是长了脚的妖怪
lyrics.pinyin: Shí jiān zhēn de xiàng shì zhǎng le jiǎo de yāo guài
lyrics.trans: Time really is like a monster with legs

lyrics.text: 跑得飞快
lyrics.pinyin: Pǎo de fēi kuài
lyrics.trans: Running away so fast

lyrics.text: 好像后来我们都离开
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng hòu lái wǒ men dōu lí kāi
lyrics.trans: It seems that later on, we both walked away

lyrics.text: 各自生活在喧嚣未来
lyrics.pinyin: Gè zì shēng huó zài xuān xiāo wèi lái
lyrics.trans: Each living our own lives in a chaotic future

lyrics.text: 当时的遗憾在回忆肆虐的某些时段
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de yí hàn zài huí yì sì nüè de mǒu xiē shí duàn
lyrics.trans: The regrets from back then surface during those moments when memories run wild

lyrics.text: 重新打开
lyrics.pinyin: Chóng xīn dǎ kāi
lyrics.trans: Unlocking it all over again

lyrics.text: 所以我们结束了异地恋
lyrics.pinyin: Suǒ yǐ wǒ men jié shù le yì dì liàn
lyrics.trans: And so we ended our long-distance relationship

lyrics.text: 甚至没见最后一面
lyrics.pinyin: Shèn zhì méi jiàn zuì hòu yī miàn
lyrics.trans: We didn't even get to see each other one last time

lyrics.text: 你说没带走的东西就留下吧 随便扔了或作纪念
lyrics.pinyin: Nǐ shuō méi dài zǒu de dōng xi jiù liú xià ba suí biàn rēng le huò zuò jì niàn
lyrics.trans: You told me to just leave whatever I didn't take, to throw it away or keep it as a memory

lyrics.text: 明明那时的我们都在 到底是什么在改变
lyrics.pinyin: Míng míng nà shí de wǒ men dōu zài dào dǐ shì shén me zài gǎi biàn
lyrics.trans: We were clearly both right there, so what exactly went wrong?

lyrics.text: 时间是长了脚的妖怪 偷走美好只留下埋怨
lyrics.pinyin: Shí jiān shì zhǎng le jiǎo de yāo guài tōu zǒu měi hǎo zhǐ liú xià mán yuàn
lyrics.trans: Time is a monster with legs, stealing away the beautiful moments and leaving only resentment behind

lyrics.text: 回忆多刺骨 浸泡着痛苦
lyrics.pinyin: Huí yì duō cì gǔ jìn pào zhe tòng gǔ
lyrics.trans: The memories are so piercing, drenched in pain

lyrics.text: 连结束都隔着屏幕线
lyrics.pinyin: Lián jié shù dōu gé zhe píng mù xiàn
lyrics.trans: Even our breakup happened across a glowing screen

lyrics.text: 小心的缝补却无法重组
lyrics.pinyin: Xiǎo xīn de féng bǔ què wú fǎ chóng zǔ
lyrics.trans: Trying carefully to patch things up, yet unable to put the pieces back together

lyrics.text: “永远”定格在“某年某月”
lyrics.pinyin: “Yǒng yuǎn” dìng gé zài “mǒu nián mǒu yuè”
lyrics.trans: "Forever" is now frozen in some forgotten month and year

lyrics.text: 原来是我总把未来期待得太过于理想化
lyrics.pinyin: Yuán lái shì wǒ zǒng bǎ wèi lái qī dài de tài guò yú lǐ xiǎng huà
lyrics.trans: It turns out I always just romanticized our future way too much

lyrics.text: 或许人总要在分别中才能够学会长大
lyrics.pinyin: Huò xǔ rén zǒng yào zài fēn bié zhōng cái néng gòu xué huì zhǎng dà
lyrics.trans: Perhaps we all have to go through heartbreaks to finally learn how to grow up

lyrics.text: 好像那时我们都在 (那时我们都在)
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng nà shí wǒ men dōu zài (Nà shí wǒ men dōu zài)
lyrics.trans: It feels like we were both there back then (We were both there back then)

lyrics.text: 当时的事都记了起来 (过去如何释怀)
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de shì dōu jì le qǐ lái (Guò qù rú hé shì huái)
lyrics.trans: Remembering everything that happened back then (How can I let go of the past)

lyrics.text: 时间真的像是长了脚的妖怪
lyrics.pinyin: Shí jiān zhēn de xiàng shì zhǎng le jiǎo de yāo guài
lyrics.trans: Time really is like a monster with legs

lyrics.text: 跑得飞快
lyrics.pinyin: Pǎo de fēi kuài
lyrics.trans: Running away so fast

lyrics.text: 好像后来我们都离开
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng hòu lái wǒ men dōu lí kāi
lyrics.trans: It seems that later on, we both walked away

lyrics.text: 各自生活在喧嚣未来
lyrics.pinyin: Gè zì shēng huó zài xuān xiāo wèi lái
lyrics.trans: Each living our own lives in a chaotic future

lyrics.text: 当时的遗憾在回忆肆虐的某些时段
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de yí hàn zài huí yì sì nüè de mǒu xiē shí duàn
lyrics.trans: The regrets from back then surface during those moments when memories run wild

lyrics.text: 重新打开
lyrics.pinyin: Chóng xīn dǎ kāi
lyrics.trans: Unlocking it all over again

lyrics.text: 还好有眼泪冲淡苦涩
lyrics.pinyin: Hái hǎo yǒu yǎn lèi chōng dàn kǔ sè
lyrics.trans: Good thing there are tears to wash away the bitterness

lyrics.text: 还好有微笑放任快乐
lyrics.pinyin: Hái hǎo yǒu wēi xiào fàng rèn kuài lè
lyrics.trans: Good thing there are smiles to let happiness flow

lyrics.text: 那些经过的留下的后继者
lyrics.pinyin: Nà xiē jīng guò de liú xià de hòu jì zhě
lyrics.trans: Those who passed by and left behind their successors

lyrics.text: 好像那时的我们都在 却还有很多承诺没有兑现
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng nà shí de wǒ men dōu zài què hái yǒu hěn duō chéng nuò méi yǒu duì xiàn
lyrics.trans: It feels like we were both there, yet so many promises remain unfulfilled

lyrics.text: 那段时光无法回来 兜兜转转彼此仍有亏欠
lyrics.pinyin: Nà duàn shí guāng wú fǎ huí lái dōu dōu zhuǎn zhuǎn bǐ cǐ réng yǒu kuī qiàn
lyrics.trans: Those times can never return; after running in circles, we still owe each other so much

lyrics.text: 习惯远比爱更难断
lyrics.pinyin: Xí guàn yuán bǐ ài gèng nán duàn
lyrics.trans: Habits are far harder to break than love itself

lyrics.text: 回忆是旧梦里的藤蔓
lyrics.pinyin: Huí yì shì jiù mèng lǐ de téng wàn
lyrics.trans: Memories are like vines tangling up our old dreams

lyrics.text: 熬过了四季的轮换 最后却怎么还是曲终人散
lyrics.pinyin: Áo guò le sì jì de lún huàn zuì hòu què zěn me hái shì qǔ zhōng rén sàn
lyrics.trans: We made it through the changing seasons, so why did it all still end with us parting ways?

lyrics.text: 我要如何才能抓得住被时间踩碎的沙漏
lyrics.pinyin: Wǒ yào rú hé cái néng zhuā de zhù bèi shí jiān cǎi suì de shā lòu
lyrics.trans: How am I supposed to hold onto an hourglass that time has already crushed?

lyrics.text: 散落在我们来时的路 枕边的合照也已发皱
lyrics.pinyin: Sàn luò zài wǒ men lái shí de lù zhěn biān de hé zhào yě yǐ fā zhòu
lyrics.trans: Scattered along the path we walked, even the photo by my pillow has become wrinkled

lyrics.text: 原来“后继者”的剧本里 你我的结局已被更改
lyrics.pinyin: Yuán lái “hòu jì zhě” de jù běn lǐ nǐ wǒ de jié jú yǐ bèi gēng gǎi
lyrics.trans: It turns out that in the script of the "Successors", our ending was already rewritten

lyrics.text: 各自生活在喧嚣的未来里 我把你交还于人海
lyrics.pinyin: Gè zì shēng huó zài xuān xiāo de wèi lái lǐ wǒ bǎ nǐ jiāo huán yú rén hǎi
lyrics.trans: As we each live our lives in this chaotic future, I'm returning you back to the sea of faces

lyrics.text: 好像后来我们都离开
lyrics.pinyin: Hǎo xiàng hòu lái wǒ men dōu lí kāi
lyrics.trans: It seems that later on, we both walked away

lyrics.text: 各自生活在喧嚣未来
lyrics.pinyin: Gè zì shēng huó zài xuān xiāo wèi lái
lyrics.trans: Each living our own lives in a chaotic future

lyrics.text: 当时的遗憾在回忆肆虐的某些时段
lyrics.pinyin: Dāng shí de yí hàn zài huí yì sì nüè de mǒu xiē shí duàn
lyrics.trans: The regrets from back then surface during those moments when memories run wild

lyrics.text: 重新打开
lyrics.pinyin: Chóng xīn dǎ kāi
lyrics.trans: Unlocking it all over again
